items.name: GOKU GAMING YT
items.review: Awesome gym, I like the air quality in the gym, it's completely built with nature.

items.name: MAHENDER
items.review: The instructors are extremely knowledgeable, highly motivated, and awesome people to be around. I've never been in a gym with a better vibe. Classes are interesting — a must see!

items.name: KAMAL TEJA
items.review: One of the best gyms I have ever seen, feels like home. Very friendly and humble owner Mr. Deepak. DK Pure Fitness helped me a lot to figure out my body. Best equipment and nature-friendly environment. Thanks Deepak bro! 🤞👍

items.name: KARIMELA ABHILASH
items.review: Training is like a brotherhood and they take great care — the best choice to improve your body.

items.name: BHARATHI RAJULAPATI
items.review: DK Pure Fitness is a great gym. It has all the state of the art equipment for cardio and weight training, plus all the associated facilities required for a good fitness setup.

items.name: SUNNY
items.review: Awesome gym experience I ever had in my life. Very nice and super place for gym.

items.name: DHATRIK BANNU
items.review: Wow nice gym actually... I'm impressed with those certified trainers ❤️

items.name: LAKSHMIKANTH AKULA
items.review: Pure Fitness is truly an awesome and pleasant place to work out with the whole family. Welcoming atmosphere, friendly staff, top-notch facilities with a wide range of equipment. Highly recommended!

items.name: CHIMALA RAJU
items.review: Well maintained gym with professional, well-mannered coaches. Love this place with modern equipment, good and pleasant location.

items.name: K. PAWANJAYANTH REDDY
items.review: Perfect for doing gym — nature embedded with unique features and very friendly vibes.

items.name: KIRTHAN REDDY
items.review: Nice place to work out, great environment.
